name: claude-code-empowerments
description: A personal marketplace of Claude Code plugins and skills — empowerments for everyday coding.

plugins.name: bake-to-completion
plugins.description: Interview-driven skill that takes a half-baked software/product idea and strengthens every aspect of it, then hands off a clean brief to design and planning.

plugins.name: anvil
plugins.description: Native effectiveness evals & improvement loop for Claude Code skills, subagents & plugins — generate balanced test data, run in-session A/B trials on your subscription, score activation / quality-delta / cost with confidence intervals, and propose improvements.

plugins.name: design-taste-frontend
plugins.description: Anti-slop frontend skill for landing pages, portfolios, and redesigns — reads the brief, infers a design direction, reaches for real design systems, and runs a strict pre-flight check against AI-design tells. Vendored with attribution from Leonxlnx/taste-skill (MIT).

plugins.name: workflow-forge
plugins.description: Bootstraps a project-tailored CLAUDE.md plus TDD, iterative review, a pre-commit test gate, symmetric-surface audits, capability sync, and TODO/WORKLOG tracking into any repo. Detects stack and OS to adapt.

plugins.name: skill-installer
plugins.description: Browse a bundled catalog of team skills and selectively install them into your user-global or current-project skills directory.
